title: LinkSphere
description: Link aggregator website that allows users to create a customizable landing page with links to their social media profiles, contact information, and more. User authentication with NextAuth. Built with Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS.

title: Zephyr
description: Weather website built around the Open-Meteo API. Users can search for weather information by location. Built with Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. Custom UI components from shadcn/ui.

title: To-Do List
description: Simple to-do list website with user authentication via NextAuth. Users can create, toggle, and delete tasks. Built with Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS.
